intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/1. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

intervals.name: Sustained climbing at race intensity
intervals.instruction: Hold 95-100% FTP for full duration. Steady power.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/2. 30:00 at 100%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/2. 95-100% FTP, 70-80 rpm, Aero. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 100% for 30:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/2. 30:00 at 100%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/2. Power: 95-100%, Cadence: 70-80 rpm, Position: Aero. Execute.

intervals.name: Sustained climbing at race intensity
intervals.instruction: Hold 98-103% FTP for full duration. Steady power.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 103% for 10:00. Then 10min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 103% × 10:00. Then 10min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 10:00 at 103%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 103% for 10:00. Then 10min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 103% × 10:00. Aero, 70-80 rpm. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 50 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 40min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 83% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 83% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
